mapper.sql: id, sale_code, model_name, variant_code, parameters, images, earnest_money, earnest_money_price, down_payment, down_payment_price, enable, sort, base_price, icon, marketing_copy, listing_status, effective_from, effective_to, available_regions, channels, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_sale_model ( id, sale_code, model_name, variant_code, parameters, images, earnest_money, earnest_money_price, down_payment, down_payment_price, enable, sort, base_price, icon, marketing_copy, listing_status, effective_from, effective_to, available_regions, channels, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{saleModelCode}, #{modelName}, #{variantCode}, #{parameters}, #{images}, #{earnestMoney}, #{earnestMoneyPrice}, #{downPayment}, #{downPaymentPrice}, #{enable}, #{sort}, #{basePrice}, #{icon}, #{marketingCopy}, #{listingStatus}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{availableRegions}, #{channels}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_sale_model ( id, sale_code, model_name, variant_code, parameters, images, earnest_money, earnest_money_price, down_payment, down_payment_price, enable, sort, base_price, icon, marketing_copy, listing_status, effective_from, effective_to, available_regions, channels, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.saleModelCode}, #{item.modelName}, #{item.variantCode}, #{item.parameters}, #{item.images}, #{item.earnestMoney}, #{item.earnestMoneyPrice}, #{item.downPayment}, #{item.downPaymentPrice}, #{item.enable}, #{item.sort}, #{item.basePrice}, #{item.icon}, #{item.marketingCopy}, #{item.listingStatus}, #{item.effectiveFrom}, #{item.effectiveTo}, #{item.availableRegions}, #{item.channels}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_sale_model t SET
t.sale_code = #{saleModelCode},
t.model_name = #{modelName},
t.variant_code = #{variantCode},
t.parameters = #{parameters},
t.images = #{images},
t.earnest_money = #{earnestMoney},
t.earnest_money_price = #{earnestMoneyPrice},
t.down_payment = #{downPayment},
t.down_payment_price = #{downPaymentPrice},
t.enable = #{enable},
t.sort = #{sort},
t.base_price = #{basePrice},
t.icon = #{icon},
t.marketing_copy = #{marketingCopy},
t.listing_status = #{listingStatus},
t.effective_from = #{effectiveFrom},
t.effective_to = #{effectiveTo},
t.available_regions = #{availableRegions},
t.channels = #{channels},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_sale_model t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vso_sale_model t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_sale_model t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_sale_model t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.sale_code = #{saleModelCode} LIMIT 1
